class.name: BTActionAS_WaitForEvent
class.brief_description: BTAction that waits for an Ability System event to occur.
class.description: A Behavior Tree action that enters [constant BT.RUNNING] state and waits for a specific ASEventTag to occur. Uses [method ASComponent.has_event_occurred] to check the Events Historical buffer. Returns [constant BT.SUCCESS] when event is detected within the time window, continues [constant BT.RUNNING] while waiting.
